title: sajorium corniculatum
intro: Sajorium corniculatum, also known as Sausage trefoil, is a perennial herb belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and relieve pain. The health benefits of Sajorium corniculatum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce anxiety and stress, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Sajorium corniculatum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
